title: Peace Activists Protest US Air Force Use at Prestwick Airport

sections.heading: What happened
sections.content: On Sunday, peace activists gathered at Prestwick Airport to voice their opposition to the facility's usage by the United States Air Force. The protest featured various demonstrations aimed at raising awareness of the issue among the public and officials.

sections.heading: Why it matters
sections.content: The rally highlights ongoing concerns regarding military presence and operations at civilian airports. Activists are advocating for changes in airport policies, emphasizing the need for transparency and accountability in military activities within the UK.

sourceReferences.citationText: serper-scottish-aviation – Peace activists rally at Prestwick Airport in protest against US Air Force use
